heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 1203 Authorization of appropriations
text: There is authorized to be appropriated not to exceed $500,000 for the fiscal year ending , $750,000 for the fiscal year ending , $1,000,000 for the period beginning , and ending , and $400,000 for each of the fiscal years ending , , , and .June 30, 1968June 30, 1969July 1, 1969June 30, 1973June 30, 1974June 30, 1975June 30, 1976June 30, 1977
notes: Amendments1972— authorized appropriations of $400,000 for fiscal years ending , 1975, 1976, and 1977.Pub. L. 92–604June 30, 19741970— substituted “for the period beginning , and ending ” for “for the fiscal year ending ”.Pub. L. 91–451July 1, 1969June 30, 1973June 30, 1970
